description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'PREMIUM COCKTAIL JUICE' with a predominantly white and gold color scheme. The front of the carton features vibrant images of assorted fruits including pineapple, apple, banana, orange, and blueberries, suggesting a mixed fruit juice. The top of the carton has a white plastic screw cap for pouring, set on a gold-colored panel. One side of the carton displays detailed nutritional information and ingredients in multiple languages. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, likely with an inner foil or plastic lining to preserve freshness. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for display in urban retail environments or for on-the-go consumption.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton with a screw cap and colorful mixed fruit illustrations, labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD'. Features nutritional information and a modern, sleek design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'FARAGELLO' branding vertically, the gold cap, and part of the nutritional panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, mixed fruit illustrations, and the cap on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and a clear view of the gold cap and top panel.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the full nutritional information panel and product details in multiple languages.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: pineapple, apple, banana, orange, and blueberries
